Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: look for patterns in the attributes that link events together Key attributes to consider patient age and patient gender These seem like strong identifiers department timestamp activity resource

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets analyze the data line by line and group them Event1 Register patient Dept ER Age45 Gender M Event2 Register patient Dept ER Age62 Gender F Different from Event1 Event3 Register patient Dept Surgery Age28 Gender M Different from1 and2 So far I have three potential starting points or distinct patients Patient A Age45 Male ER Patient B Age62 Female ER Patient C Age28 Male Surgery
